summary: Fixed a Makefile typo where WARN_ERROR attempted to append `-warn iserror` to `CLAGS` instead of `CFLAGS`, making the warning-as-error setting actually affect compiler flags. The PR also carried broad header/prototype cleanup around GXTexture and sysdolphin baselib: asm function signatures were made explicit, redundant non-MWERKS NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs were removed, a new `baselib_unknown_008.h` header was added, `HSD_AObjDesc` was converted to a named struct with a forward typedef, and many baselib internal prototypes were added to headers. There were no issue/review comments in the slice, so intent beyond the diff is inferred from the changed files.
what_changed: Corrected `Makefile` warning-as-error handling from `CLAGS += -warn iserror` to `CFLAGS += -warn iserror` under `ifeq ($(WARN_ERROR),1)`.
Updated `GXTexture.c` asm declarations to include argument lists for `__GetImageTileCount(u32, s16, s16, s32*, s32*, s32*)` and `__SetSURegs(s32, s32)` instead of `void` signatures.
Removed several non-`MWERKS_GEKKO` fallback `NOT_IMPLEMENTED` stubs from `GXTexture.c`, including stubs for `GXGetTexBufferSize`, `__GetImageTileCount`, `GXInitTexObj`, and `__SetSURegs`.
Moved/centralized GX internal prototypes by adding `__GetImageTileCount` and corrected `__SetSURegs` to `GXTexture.h`, while deleting duplicate declarations from `GX_unknown_001/__GX_unknown_001.h`.
Changed `HSD_AObjDesc` from a typedef of `struct _HSD_AObjDesc` to a named `struct HSD_AObjDesc`, and added `typedef struct HSD_AObjDesc HSD_AObjDesc;` to `forward.h`.
Replaced many animation descriptor references from `struct _HSD_AObjDesc*` to `HSD_AObjDesc*` across baselib headers such as `cobj.h`, `lobj.h`, `mobj.h`, `robj.h`, `tobj.h`, and `wobj.h`.
Added new header `src/sysdolphin/baselib/baselib_unknown_008.h` declaring `func_803B3344(u8 byte)` and `func_803B3398(void* src, size_t size)`, and included it from `baselib_unknown_008.c`.
Added numerous internal baselib prototypes to headers for class, fog, gobj, gobjplink, gobjproc, shadow, texp, wobj, debug, and gobjobject modules.

Adjusted `func_80390A70` in `gobjobject.c/.h` to accept `any_t obj` rather than a more specific `HSD_JObj*`, matching its generic object attachment behavior as shown by the implementation assigning an object by kind.
smart_moves: The Makefile fix is minimal and targeted: changing only `CLAGS` to `CFLAGS` preserves the existing `WARN_ERROR` flow while making the flag effective.
Giving handwritten asm wrappers real C prototypes is useful for type checking and cross-file callers without changing the asm body.
Centralizing GX texture internal declarations in `GXTexture.h` and removing duplicate declarations from a private unknown header reduces prototype drift.
Introducing a forward typedef for `HSD_AObjDesc` avoids spelling the incomplete struct tag repeatedly and makes dependent animation structs cleaner.
Adding a module header for `baselib_unknown_008.c` documents exported functions and lets the implementation include its own declarations, which helps catch signature mismatches.
decomp_lessons: Build-system typos can silently disable important validation; in this case `WARN_ERROR=1` did not work as intended because flags were appended to `CLAGS` instead of `CFLAGS`.

For MWERKS asm functions, include the parameter list in the `asm void name(...)` declaration when known; it improves consistency with headers and call sites while keeping the function as handwritten asm.
Avoid maintaining the same internal prototype in multiple headers. Prefer a single owning header and include it where needed.
When a descriptor type is shared across many baselib systems, use a stable typedef and forward declaration rather than leaking an old/incorrect struct tag everywhere.
Having `.c` files include their own module header is a useful decomp hygiene pattern because it forces implementation signatures to agree with exported declarations.

The diff contains duplicated prototype additions in several headers, which may indicate mechanical cleanup or weak review evidence; future similar cleanups should deduplicate declarations before merge when possible.
naming_conventions: `HSD_AObjDesc` is standardized as the public typedef name for the animation object descriptor instead of using `struct _HSD_AObjDesc*` at use sites.
Forward declarations in `forward.h` use the pattern `typedef struct HSD_Type HSD_Type;`, shown here with `typedef struct HSD_AObjDesc HSD_AObjDesc;`.
Unknown or not-yet-named baselib functions retain address-style names such as `func_803B3344`, `func_803B3398`, `func_80390CD4`, and `lbl_80391044`.
Internal GX routines keep double-underscore names such as `__SetSURegs` and `__GetImageTileCount`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed asm function declarations from untyped `asm void __GetImageTileCount(void)` to `asm void __GetImageTileCount(u32, s16, s16, s32*, s32*, s32*)`.
Changed asm function declaration from `asm void __SetSURegs(void)` to `asm void __SetSURegs(s32, s32)`.
Removed non-MWERKS `NOT_IMPLEMENTED` stubs around functions that are implemented only under `MWERKS_GEKKO`, reducing duplicate symbol/prototype noise in the source.
Kept the asm bodies unchanged, indicating the matching tactic was signature/header hygiene rather than codegen changes to the assembly itself.
review_feedback: The slice reports one review but includes no review body or review comments, so no specific reviewer feedback is available.
No human discussion is available in the provided PR context; conclusions are based on the title and diff excerpt only.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that removed duplicate prototype declarations added in baselib headers around PR 706.
Search for additional `CLAGS` typos or other misspelled Makefile variables.
Check whether `HSD_AObjDesc` struct-tag naming was further normalized after this PR.
Search for callers of `__GetImageTileCount` and `__SetSURegs` to verify the corrected prototypes match all call sites.
Inspect later work on `baselib_unknown_008` to see if `func_803B3344` and `func_803B3398` received descriptive names.
